description.ko: 유기적인 막과 혈관 시스템이 액체 금으로 맥동하는, 자연의 숨쉬는 빛을 표현한 작품입니다.
description.en: A representation of breathing light of nature, where organic membranes and vascular systems pulse with liquid gold.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Synaptic Tide.' A colossal respiratory organ composed of #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular filaments, floating in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere. The structure exhales rhythmic, viscous ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar that flow like liquid silk through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro focus on the semi-permeable translucent textures and complex internal capillary systems of glowing sap. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution.
